title: MarketContext
description: Market context snapshot for a single asset from a single venue. All monetary values in USD unless noted. Missing/unavailable fields MUST be null.

asset.description: Asset symbol, e.g. BTC, ETH, SOL, HYPE. Uppercase.

venue.description: Exchange/venue identifier, e.g. binance, hyperliquid, bybit.

snapshot_time_utc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the market data was sampled.

change_1h_pct.description: Price change percentage over 1 hour. null if unavailable.

change_24h_pct.description: Price change percentage over 24 hours. null if unavailable.

volume_24h_usd.description: 24-hour trading volume in USD. null if unavailable. Unit: USD.

open_interest_usd.description: Open interest in USD. null if unavailable or not applicable. Unit: USD.

funding_rate_pct.description: Current funding rate as percentage. null if unavailable.

mark_price.description: Current mark price (futures) in USD. null if unavailable or spot market.

oracle_price.description: Oracle price in USD. null if unavailable.

high_24h.description: 24-hour high price in USD. null if unavailable.

low_24h.description: 24-hour low price in USD. null if unavailable.

source_health.description: Health status of the data source.
